summary: Shake-to-SOS feature fully tested. Backend API 100% (5/5 tests passed). Frontend UI 100% - all overlay phases and profile toggle working correctly.

backend_api_tests.TestShakeSOSAPI::test_sos_shake_trigger_: PASS - SOS endpoint accepts trigger_type='shake' and returns guardian notifications
PASS - Location data correctly included in shake SOS
backend_api_tests.TestShakeSOSAPI::test_sos_trigger_types_: PASS - All valid trigger types (manual, voice, button, shake, auto) accepted
backend_api_tests.TestShakeSOSAPI::test_sos_invalid_trigge: PASS - Invalid trigger types return 422 validation error
backend_api_tests.TestShakeSOSAPI::test_sos_shake_returns_: PASS - Guardian notification details returned correctly

ui_tests.ShakeSOSOverlay_countdown_phase: PASS - Full-screen overlay renders with countdown number, 'SHAKE DETECTED' text, animated ring
ui_tests.ShakeSOSOverlay_cancel_button: PASS - Cancel button visible with 'Tap cancel if this was accidental' helper text
ui_tests.ShakeSOSOverlay_cancel_dismisses: PASS - Cancel button dismisses the overlay correctly
ui_tests.ShakeSOSOverlay_sending_phase: PASS - Shows 'Sending SOS...' with 'Alerting your guardian network' message
ui_tests.ShakeSOSOverlay_sent_phase: PASS - Shows 'SOS Activated' with 'Your guardians have been alerted'
ui_tests.MobileProfile_shake_toggle_visible: PASS - 'Shake to SOS' toggle visible under 'Emergency Controls' section
ui_tests.MobileProfile_shake_toggle_localStorage: PASS - Toggle correctly changes localStorage 'Nagarik_shake_sos' between 'true' and 'false'
ui_tests.MobileProfile_shake_toggle_visual: PASS - Toggle visual state reflects enabled (red) / disabled (gray) correctly
ui_tests.MobileLayout_overlay_integration: PASS - ShakeSOSOverlay component integrated in MobileLayout

ShakeSOSOverlay.countdown_display: PASS - 3, 2, 1 countdown with animated progress ring
ShakeSOSOverlay.cancel_button: PASS - Cancel button present with data-testid='shake-sos-cancel'
ShakeSOSOverlay.helper_text: PASS - 'Tap cancel if this was accidental' shown
ShakeSOSOverlay.sos_trigger: PASS - After countdown, SOS is triggered via POST /api/safety-events/sos with trigger_type='shake'
ShakeSOSOverlay.sending_phase: PASS - Shows 'Sending SOS...' during API call
ShakeSOSOverlay.sent_phase: PASS - Shows 'SOS Activated' after successful API call

Profile_Settings.toggle_visibility: PASS - 'Shake to SOS' toggle visible under 'Emergency Controls'
Profile_Settings.toggle_label: PASS - Label shows 'Shake to SOS' with 'Shake phone to trigger emergency alert' description
Profile_Settings.visual_state: PASS - Toggle shows red when enabled, gray when disabled

Backend_API.guardian_notifications: PASS - Returns guardian_notifications array with name, relationship, channels
Backend_API.validation: PASS - Rejects invalid trigger types with 422

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes correctly implemented: shake-sos-overlay, shake-sos-cancel, shake-sos-toggle, shake-sos-setting, shake-sos-sent
useShakeDetector hook has proper cooldown (5s) and threshold (25 magnitude) settings
ShakeSOSOverlay handles all phases correctly: countdown, sending, sent, failed
localStorage persistence for shake SOS preference working correctly
DeviceMotionEvent simulation works in Playwright for testing shake detection
seed_data_creation: Multiple SOS events triggered during testing (shake trigger type)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shake-to-SOS feature fully implemented and tested. The shake detection can be simulated in Playwright by dispatching DeviceMotionEvent with magnitude > 25. The overlay has a 5-second cooldown between shake triggers. All data-testid attributes are present for automated testing. The feature is integrated in MobileLayout and preference is stored in localStorage key 'Nagarik_shake_sos'.
